emails.subject: Tenaska IV Gas
emails.body: Are you going to make the price changes to the Tenaska IV sale 384258 for 10/00 and 11/00 that James details below? Right now, we are showing a short pay of $351,201.49 for those two months. Megan Forwarded by Megan Parker/Corp/Enron on 12/29/2000 11:46 AM James Armstrong@ECT 12/19/2000 10:31 AM

emails.subject: Re: Tenaska IV Gas
emails.body: Re: Tenaska IV Gas Yes, it will work. Thanks. We still need to look at the Apache and Williams deals. There are pricing and demand fee issues. I can forward you the emails if you need them. Megan
